_meta.note: responseTransferMode controls whether the gateway buffers the integration response (BUFFERED) or streams it (STREAM). For Lambda proxy integrations behind an LLM streaming workload, BUFFERED is wrong because (a) the client cannot see partial responses, and (b) responses longer than 29 seconds time out at the gateway. To fix: change to STREAM and update the Lambda to use awslambda.streamifyResponse.
